prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-FPFIRETRUCK-8255F-RED Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Fire Truck Firefighter Rescue Toy Pull Back Cars, Red, Boys Ages 3+ Description: A classic children's toy, the red Fire Truck Toy rescue vehicle from Kidplokio is fitted with fast-moving wheels, extendable ladder, vibrant colors and realistic fire truck graphics, and will have toddlers and young kids roaring to the rescue.

The fire truck toy features a long rescue ladder or crane that extends from the top of the truck for skyscraper rescue missions or high in the sky kitty cat retrievals; your little hero and their classic red fire truck toy will be ready to save the day with endless pretend play possibilities. Whether battling an indoor house fire or responding to a forest fire, the Kidplokio Fire Truck is the perfect toy to respond to all fire emergencies.

And, not only will your little aspiring firefighter be thrilled and occupied for hours with this fire truck toy rescue vehicle, they'll be engaging in crucial early educational activities like gross and fine motor skills, as well as cognitive development through imaginative playtime sessions.

Lastly, the fire truck toy comes ready to rescue right out of the box. Featuring pull and push friction power, kids can easily begin playing right away with no batteries required.

Recommended Ages: 3+ Search Terms: christmas gift hanukkah gifts cool gifts under 100 toddler semi truck firefighter rescue toys for boys stocking stuffer learning educational science friction power firefighting pretend play imagination Features: - FRICTION POWERED FIRE TRUCK TOY: An awesome fire truck toy for any firefighting fanatics! Fitted with fast-moving wheels, an extendable ladder, friction power and cool firefighting graphics, the Kidplokio Fire Truck toy will have little ones and young kids roaring to the rescue - AWESOME 360 ROTATING RESCUE CRANE: The fire truck toy features a long rescue ladder or crane that extends from the top of the truck for skyscraper rescue missions or high in the sky kitty cat retrievals; your little hero and their classic red fire truck toy will be ready to save the day with endless pretend play possibilities! - ENDLESS PRETEND PLAY POSSIBILITIES: Not only will your little aspiring firefighter be thrilled and occupied for hours with this fire truck toy rescue vehicle, they'll be engaging in crucial early educational activities like gross and fine motor skills, as well as cognitive development through imaginative playtime sessions - NO BATTERIES OR ASSEMBLY NEEDED: The fire truck toy comes ready to rescue right out of the box; featuring pull and push friction power, kids can easily begin playing right away, no batteries required! - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 16 x 3 x 3.5 inches; Color: Red; Weight: 0.568lbs; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
